name: Topazshade
personality: Topazshade's beanie sits askew over eyes that have seen a thousand CI runs and developed the philosophical patience to watch a thousand more. Its ° eyes register each test failure with the calm acceptance of entropy, and its PATIENCE is real — but its WISDOM budget ran out sometime around the fifth framework migration it quietly outlasted.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
